_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Teamspeak 6 Manager
author: snxrcsme@gmail.com
description: Web-based management interface for TeamSpeak 6 servers by clusterzx. Ships as a pre-built GHCR image (ghcr.io/snxrcs/ts6-manager) that contains the React frontend, Express backend, and Go WebRTC sidecar. No build step on the Pelican server - the image is pulled and run directly.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# TS6-Manager Pelican install script (thin variant).
# All heavy lifting is done by the pre-built GHCR image
# (ghcr.io/snxrcs/ts6-manager). This script only ensures
# persistent directories exist.

set -e
echo "=== TS6-Manager (prebuilt image) install: start ==="
date -u

TARGET="/mnt/server"
mkdir -p "${TARGET}/data/music"

# Nothing else to do. .env is generated on first boot by /app/start.sh.
echo "[install] Data dirs ready. Start-up files live inside the image at /app/."
echo "[install] The runtime image will auto-generate .env on first boot."
echo "=== TS6-Manager install: done ==="
date -u

variables.name: Backend Port
variables.description: Internal port the Node.js backend listens on. Stays inside the container, not publicly reachable.

variables.name: Sidecar Port
variables.description: Internal port the Go WebRTC sidecar listens on. Stays inside the container.

variables.name: Frontend URL (CORS origin)
variables.description: Public URL users will open in their browser. Used as CORS origin on the backend. Example: https://ts6.example.com. Leave empty to let the image default to http://0.0.0.0:SERVER_PORT.

variables.name: Allow Self-Signed TS Certs
variables.description: Set to true if your TeamSpeak WebQuery uses a self-signed certificate. Default: false.
